name: trustmrr-mcp
description: Browse and filter verified startup revenue data from TrustMRR. Filter by MRR, growth, asking price, category, and more — all backed by real payment provider data.
long_description:
TrustMRR MCP gives Claude direct access to the TrustMRR API, which surfaces verified startup revenue metrics sourced from Stripe, LemonSqueezy, Polar, Paddle, and other payment providers.

Tools included:
- list_startups: paginated startup discovery with 15+ filter/sort parameters
- get_startup: full detail for a single startup including tech stack, cofounders, social metrics, and extended financials

All monetary values are returned in USD cents and converted to human-readable USD in tool descriptions. Rate limit: 20 requests/minute.

tools.name: list_startups
tools.description: Browse and filter the TrustMRR startup directory. Returns paginated results with verified revenue, MRR, growth, asking price, and more. Supports filtering by category, revenue range, sale status, founder X handle, and sorting by revenue, price, growth, or best deal.

tools.name: get_startup
tools.description: Get full details for a single startup by slug. Returns everything from list_startups plus: full (untruncated) description, tech stack, cofounders, X follower count, and merchant-of-record status.

api_key.title: TrustMRR API Key
api_key.description: Your TrustMRR API key. Generate one from https://trustmrr.com/developer — keys start with tmrr_.
